creator: Alibaba
justification_a: Titan/Nova competes; AWS does not host Alibaba models
justification_b: R2:AWS cloud infrastructure and AI workloads; R6:Titan and Nova models compete in foundation models
audit_note: 云服务宽窄口径分歧。按宽口径，AWS 是 AI cloud 基础设施，B=1。按实际托管口径，A=0。建议先固定 R2 口径。

creator: Google
justification_a: Alphabet is Google's listed parent
justification_b: F2:listed parent of Google model releases; R2:Google Cloud and Vertex AI infrastructure
audit_note: 自有发布方事件是否仍标 upstream_cloud 的口径分歧。codebook 示例不完全一致，建议统一 self-cloud 规则。

creator: Mistral AI
justification_a: Azure hosts Mistral; Phi competes; EUR15M investment
justification_b: F1:Microsoft minority investment in Mistral AI; R2:Azure cloud infrastructure for AI workloads; R6:Phi models and OpenAI partnership create model competition; R3:Microsoft Copilot integrates frontier LLM capability
audit_note: Microsoft 是否对所有非自有发布方保持 R3 的一致性分歧。若 Copilot 暴露按 creator 通用处理，B=1。
